function.name: get_datetime
function.description: Returns the current date and time in ISO 8601 format, optionally adjusted for a timezone offset.

offset.description: Timezone offset in hours (e.g. 1 for UTC+1). Defaults to UTC if not provided.

function.name: get_timestamp
function.description: Returns the current Unix timestamp (seconds since 1970-01-01 UTC).

function.name: get_microtimestamp
function.description: Returns the current Unix timestamp with microsecond precision as a float.

function.name: get_timezones
function.description: Returns a list of all available timezones. Optionally filter by UTC offset.

offset.description: Filter timezones by this UTC offset (e.g. 1 for UTC+1).

function.name: get_swatch_internet_time
function.description: Returns the current time in Swatch Internet Time (.beats, 0–999) and the current date. No time zones involved.

function.name: get_random_number
function.description: Returns a random integer within a given range. Defaults to 1–6 (like a die roll) if no range is specified.

function.name: get_random_color
function.description: Returns a random hex color code (e.g. #A3F2C1).

function.name: get_uuid
function.description: Generates and returns a UUID v4.

function.name: get_guid
function.description: Generates and returns a GUID.

function.name: base64_encode
function.description: Encodes a string into Base64 format.

function.name: base64_decode
function.description: Decodes a Base64-encoded string back to its original text.

function.name: base58_encode
function.description: Encodes a string into Base58 format.

function.name: base58_decode
function.description: Decodes a Base58-encoded string back to its original text.

function.name: base32_encode
function.description: Encodes a string into Base32 format.

function.name: base32_decode
function.description: Decodes a Base32-encoded string back to its original text.

function.name: jwt_encode
function.description: Encodes a JSON payload into a JWT using HS256. Requires a secret key.

data.description: The JSON payload to encode into the JWT.

secret.description: The secret key used to sign the JWT.

function.name: jwt_decode
function.description: Decodes a JWT and returns its payload. Requires the secret key used to sign it.

data.description: The JWT token string to decode.

secret.description: The secret key used to verify and decode the JWT.

function.name: qrcode_encode
function.description: Generates a QR code from text or a URL. Returns a Base64-encoded PNG image.

data.description: The text or URL to encode into a QR code.

function.name: qrcode_decode
function.description: Decodes a QR code image and returns the embedded text. Accepts a Base64-encoded image.

function.name: hash_md5
function.description: Generates an MD5 hash of the provided input string.

function.name: hash_sha1
function.description: Generates a SHA1 hash of the provided input string.

function.name: hash_sha256
function.description: Generates a SHA256 hash of the provided input string.

function.name: hash_sha512
function.description: Generates a SHA512 hash of the provided input string.

function.name: ping
function.description: Sends a ping to verify the API is reachable. Returns 'pong'.

function.name: health_check
function.description: Returns the API health status and a high-precision timestamp.

function.name: get_client_ip
function.description: Returns the public IP address of the caller.

function.name: ip_lookup
function.description: Performs a reverse IP lookup, returning country, city, coordinates, and timezone for a given IP address.

ip.description: The IP address to look up (e.g. '8.8.8.8').

function.name: storage_set
function.description: Stores JSON or text data temporarily and returns a UUID for later retrieval. Data expires after 24 hours.

data.description: The data to store (JSON object or string).

function.name: storage_get
function.description: Retrieves previously stored data using a UUID returned by storage_set. Data expires after 24 hours.

uuid.description: The UUID returned when the data was stored.

function.name: shorten_url
function.description: Shortens a long URL. Returns a short redirect link. Expires after 24 hours.

function.name: webhook_capture
function.description: Captures and returns the full details of an incoming HTTP request. Useful for testing webhooks and debugging integrations. Data expires after 24 hours.

function.name: webhook_action
function.description: Creates a human-in-the-loop action with a web form for human input. Returns a form URL and a result URL to poll for the response. Expires after 24 hours.

title.description: The title shown on the action form.

fields.description: Form fields for the action. Each field has a type (radio, select, text, textarea, checkbox), name, label, and optional options array.

function.name: generate_solana_wallet
function.description: Generates a new Solana wallet with a private key, Base58-encoded private key, and public address. For development and testing only.

function.name: generate_bitcoin_wallet
function.description: Generates a new Bitcoin wallet with a private key (hex and WIF) and a Base58Check-encoded address. For development and testing only.

function.name: generate_ethereum_wallet
function.description: Generates a new Ethereum wallet with a private key and public address. For development and testing only.
